title: Agreement Template
description: Frontmatter contract for an agreement template under templates/ (BAA, subcontractor/subprocessor agreement, DPA, …).

id.description: Stable template id (kebab-case); must match the filename stem.

signer.description: The persona expected to sign / fill this template.

counterparty.description: Who the signer enters the agreement with (e.g. 'hds', 'subcontractor').

covers.description: Requirement refs this template helps satisfy, as 'scopeId.ref' (e.g. 'hipaa-security.164.314(a)(1)').
